title: Clinical and genetic evaluation of hereditary myopathies in an adult Saudi cohort.
author: Alhammad RM Alrehaili ML Albulaihe HM Aljereish SS Alanazy MH
content:
S-EPMC11373090 PMC11373090 Clinical and genetic evaluation of hereditary myopathies in an adult Saudi cohort.

Background

Diagnosis of hereditary myopathy is often challenging owing to overlapping clinical phenotypes and muscle histopathological findings. This retrospective study aimed
